allow: PowerShell(git commit -m "docs: capture lessons from MVP build session")

PowerShell($f = "_site/index.html"; "Size: $\(\(Get-Item $f\).Length\) bytes"; "Tailwind CSS: $\(\(Get-Item _site/assets/css/tailwind.css\).Length\) bytes"; "---"; Select-String -Path $f -Pattern "podium-card|animate-goldGlow|animate-barFill|animate-flagSweep|gold-shimmer|chip|countdownLabel" | Measure-Object | Select-Object -Expand Count | ForEach-Object { "Matches for new styling hooks: $_" }; "---"; Select-String -Path _site/assets/css/tailwind.css -Pattern "pitch-bg|gold-shimmer|podium-card|flag-stripe|animate-goldGlow|barFill" | Measure-Object | Select-Object -Expand Count | ForEach-Object { "CSS rules emitted: $_" })

PowerShell($css = Get-Content _site/assets/css/tailwind.css -Raw; "pitch-bg present: $\($css -match 'pitch-bg'\)"; "gold-shimmer present: $\($css -match 'gold-shimmer'\)"; "podium-card present: $\($css -match 'podium-card'\)"; "flag-stripe present: $\($css -match 'flag-stripe'\)"; "@keyframes goldGlow: $\($css -match 'goldGlow'\)"; "@keyframes barFill: $\($css -match 'barFill'\)"; "@keyframes pitchPan: $\($css -match 'pitchPan'\)"; "animate-goldGlow utility: $\($css -match 'animate-goldGlow'\)"; "animate-barFill utility: $\($css -match 'animate-barFill'\)"; "Total CSS length: $\($css.Length\)")
PowerShell(git add tailwind.config.js src/styles/input.css src/_data/site.js src/_includes/layout.njk src/pages/index.njk)

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://varungupta11288-dev.github.io/fifa-predictor/assets/css/tailwind.css" -UseBasicParsing; "CSS size: $\($resp.RawContentLength\) bytes"; "Has podium-card: $\($resp.Content.Contains\('podium-card'\)\)"; "Has pitch-bg: $\($resp.Content.Contains\('pitch-bg'\)\)"; "Has gold-shimmer: $\($resp.Content.Contains\('gold-shimmer'\)\)"; "Has barFill: $\($resp.Content.Contains\('barFill'\)\)")
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: auto-derive results from API so daily Deploy is one click' -m 'Fold the football-data.org fetch into '\\''npm run deploy'\\'' and derive the *)

Bash(node -e 'const h=require\('\\''fs'\\''\).readFileSync\('\\''__TRACKED_VAR__'\\'','\\''utf8'\\''\); const i=h.indexOf\('\\''>SF<'\\''\); console.log\(i<0?'\\''SF NOT FOUND'\\'':h.slice\(i-90, i+760\).replace\(/\\n\\s*/g,'\\''\\n'\\''\).replace\(/\\n{2,}/g,'\\''\\n'\\''\)\);')

Bash(node -e 'const h=require\('\\''fs'\\''\).readFileSync\('\\''__TRACKED_VAR__'\\'','\\''utf8'\\''\); const i=h.indexOf\('\\''🏆 Winner'\\''\); console.log\(i<0?'\\''WINNER NOT FOUND'\\'':h.slice\(i-160, i+520\).replace\(/\\n\\s*/g,'\\''\\n'\\''\).replace\(/\\n{2,}/g,'\\''\\n'\\''\)\);')

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./_site/assets/css/tailwind.css','utf8'\); const util=c.search\(/\\.animate-barFill\\{/\); const gate=c.search\(/\\.lb-gated .animate-barFill/\); console.log\('utility .animate-barFill at:', util\); console.log\('.lb-gated rule at:', gate\); console.log\('gate comes after utility:', gate>util\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('data/fixtures/schedule.json'\)\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\('fetchedAt:', d.fetchedAt\); console.log\('count:', d.matches.length\); console.log\('sample match:', JSON.stringify\(d.matches[0],null,2\)\); const dates=[...new Set\(d.matches.map\(m=>m.utcDate.slice\(0,10\)\)\)].sort\(\); console.log\('first dates:', dates.slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('last dates:', dates.slice\(-3\)\);")
Bash(cd "/c/Users/varun.j.gupta/OneDrive - Accenture/Code/fifa" && find src/_data -type f -name "*.js" | xargs grep -l "pagination\\|alias" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./node_modules/@11ty/eleventy/package.json'\); console.log\('bin:', JSON.stringify\(p.bin\)\); console.log\('type:', p.type\); console.log\('version:', p.version\);")

Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{console.log\('modalKey:',\(s.match\(/=== \(\\"[^\\"]+\\"\)/\)||[]\)[1]\);console.log\('Thanks for playing:',s.includes\('Thanks for playing'\)\);console.log\('final-leaderboard CTA:',s.includes\('View final leaderboard'\)\);console.log\('thanks trophy:',s.includes\('modal-thanks-trophy'\)\);console.log\('match cards:',\(s.match\(/modal-match-card/g\)||[]\).length\);}\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse data/submissions, data/predictions, data/links, data/results -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; "--- schedule.json score sample ---"; if \(Test-Path data/fixtures/schedule.json\) { \(Get-Content data/fixtures/schedule.json -Raw\).Substring\(0,400\) })
